terms.definition: MP Ministry Platform User_GUID (UUID). Stored on `session.user` via Better Auth `additionalFields`, populated from the OIDC `sub` claim by `mapProfileToUser`. REQUIRED for every MP API lookup of the signed-in user — `session.user.id` is a Better Auth internal nanoid and is NOT interchangeable.

Better Auth plugin wrapping the server `auth` config that enriches every `getSession()` response. In this project it only performs name-splitting (`firstName`/`lastName`) — no API calls — to keep session reads fast. Client-side counterpart `customSessionClient<typeof auth>()` provides type inference but does NOT expose `additionalFields`.

Better Auth plugin that wires arbitrary OIDC providers. Configured here with `providerId: "ministry-platform"`, OIDC discovery URL, offline_access + MP all scope, `pkce: false`, and `realm=realm` authorization param. Callback URL follows plugin convention `/api/auth/oauth2/callback/{providerId}`.

Next.js 16 renamed `middleware.ts`/`middleware()` to `proxy.ts`/`proxy()`. In this project it performs a session-cookie-presence check via `getSessionCookie()` (no JWT decode) and forwards `pathname + search` as the `x-pathname` header.
Better Auth stateless session strategy: 1-hour TTL JWT in a cookie. No database. Subsequent `getSession()` calls decode the cookie directly.

Public-API facade class for Ministry Platform operations. Normalizes friendly param names (`select`, `filter`, `top`) to `$`-prefixed OData params, offers optional Zod validation on create/update, and delegates to the singleton MinistryPlatformProvider.
Process-singleton orchestrator that owns one MinistryPlatformClient and six domain services. Created once via getInstance(); every MPHelper instance resolves to the same provider.
Token-lifecycle + HttpClient holder. Owns two independent pipelines (default + dev) each with its own token cache, `expiresAt`, and HttpClient.
Low-level fetch wrapper for the provider stack. Injects `Authorization: Bearer <token>` via closure, serializes JSON or FormData, URL-encodes query params, throws formatted Errors on non-2xx.

OAuth2 grant type used by the provider to acquire tokens for server-to-MP calls. POST to `{baseUrl}/oauth/connect/token` with `grant_type=client_credentials`. Distinct from the Better Auth user-login OAuth flow.
Union type `'default' | 'dev'` selecting which pair of env vars supplies the client id/secret. `'dev'` is used only by ProcedureService when executing `api_dev_*` stored procedures.
Constant `5 * 60 * 1000` (ms). MinistryPlatformClient refreshes after this hard-coded 5 minutes for safety, ignoring MP's `expires_in`.

Option passed to `MPHelper.createTableRecords` / `updateTableRecords` that stamps MP audit columns. Not the same as Better Auth's `session.user.id`; resolve from `session.user.userGuid` via `UserService.getUserIdByGuid`.

SQL-side convention: every `api_*` stored procedure MUST declare @DomainID INT as its first parameter. The MP REST API injects the authenticated domain automatically when calling procedures — callers never pass @DomainID from TypeScript.
Procedures whose name starts with `api_dev_` (case-insensitive, trailing underscore required) are routed through an isolated dev-credential HttpClient. `api_developer_*` does NOT match.
Ministry Platform user-scoped record set (identified by Selection_ID + User_ID + Page_ID) returned by api_Common_GetSelection; the 'selected records' context passed to cloud tools.
TS interface describing the first-result-set row returned by api_Tools_GetPageData: Page_ID, Display_Name, Singular_Name, Table_Name, Primary_Key, and optional tool-config fields.

Application service class with private constructor and static `getInstance(): Promise<T>` that lazily constructs and initializes a single shared instance holding an `MPHelper`. Reset in tests via `(ServiceClass as any).instance = undefined`.

MP REST convention for following a foreign key: suffix the FK column with `_TABLE` then dot-access a field. Chain with `_TABLE_` between levels; dot only before the final field. Example: `Household_ID_TABLE_Address_ID_TABLE.Postal_Code`.
MP REST error raised when a column name appears in multiple tables joined by `_TABLE` FK traversal. Resolved by prefixing: `TableName.Column` or `FKColumn_TABLE.Column`.
Helper that escapes `'` → `''`, `%` → `[%]`, `_` → `[_]` before interpolating user input into an MP `$filter` string. Used by `GroupService.searchContacts`/`searchGroups`.
Enriched client-side user profile combining dp_Users row + joined Contact fields + roles[] + userGroups[]. Loaded via UserService.getUserProfile(userGuid) and cached in UserContext.
Thin React hook that returns only the `data` portion of Better Auth's authClient.useSession(). Preferred client-side session accessor; drops isPending/error/refetch.
Client React provider mounted in src/app/providers.tsx that watches the Better Auth session and loads the MPUserProfile via getCurrentUserProfile whenever userGuid is present.
Next.js App Router convention: a directory wrapped in parentheses groups routes under a shared layout without contributing a URL segment. Used here as src/app/(web)/ to apply AuthWrapper.

Server component at src/components/layout/auth-wrapper.tsx that runs inside the (web) route group. Calls `auth.api.getSession()` and redirects unauthenticated users to /signin?callbackUrl=<x-pathname>. Layer-2 session validation to the proxy's layer-1 cookie check.
Request header set by src/proxy.ts on passthrough responses. Carries pathname+search so downstream server components (notably AuthWrapper) can build a correct callbackUrl.
Query-string parameter on /signin that captures the originally requested URL. Preserved across the OAuth redirect so the user lands back on the exact tool + params after sign-in.
Vitest helper that declares variables which must exist before `vi.mock()` factories run. Required whenever a mock variable is referenced inside a `vi.mock()` factory.
Pattern of setting `(ServiceClass as any).instance = undefined` inside `beforeEach` to clear cached service singletons between tests.
Pattern of mocking a constructable import as a `class { method = mockFn }` literal rather than `vi.fn().mockImplementation()`. Required for `MPHelper`.
Hand-written TypeScript interface/type shaping data between layers. Distinct from auto-generated MP model types in src/lib/providers/ministry-platform/models/.
UI-layer label view model (camelCase) produced by transforming ContactAddressRow in address-label server actions.
Label-generation configuration object: stockId, addressMode, startPosition, includeMissingBarcodes, barcodeFormat, mailerId, serviceType. Persisted to localStorage.
Record of a contact excluded from label printing; shape `{name, contactId, reason}` where reason is SkipReason union.
USPS 65-bar, 4-state (T/D/A/F) mail barcode encoding a 20-digit tracking block + optional 5/9/11-digit routing code. Encoded by the hand-rolled `imbEncode()`.
Legacy USPS tall/short barcode for 5/9/11-digit ZIPs with Mod-10 check digit. Used as IMb fallback when Mailer ID is absent or IMb encoding throws.
USPS-assigned 6- or 9-digit identifier embedded in the IMb tracking block. Serial-number length is derived from Mailer ID length.
Single ingestion point for Ministry Platform tool URL query strings (`pageID`, `s`, `sc`, `p`, `q`, `v`, `recordID`, `recordDescription`, `addl`). Hydrates `pageData`; returns typed `ToolParams`.
Client-side full-screen flex shell that composes DevPanel (conditional), ToolHeader, scrollable body, and ToolFooter for every tool page.
Component primitive library installed via the shadcn CLI using the new-york style, slate base color, CSS variables, lucide icons. Configured at components.json.
Client-only drag-and-drop visual editor used for the template editor; wrapped via next/dynamic with ssr:false.
Responsive-email markup language; source is edited in GrapesJS and server-compiled to HTML via the mjml package in compileMjml.
Localhost-only developer overlay rendered by ToolContainer when params are present. Gated on mounted + NODE_ENV === 'development' + hostname in {localhost, 127.0.0.1}.
MP OAuth server endpoint at /oauth/connect/endsession that ends the SSO session and redirects to a pre-registered post_logout_redirect_uri.
A row describing how one column is presented on an MP page: order, group, required, hidden, label, default value, filter clause, depends-on field, and writing-assistant flag.
30-labels-per-sheet Avery stock (3 cols x 10 rows) on US Letter, 189pt x 72pt per label. Default stockId in AddressLabels UI.
Secondary tab in /tools/addresslabels that lets the user upload a .docx template with {Name}/{AddressLine1}/{City}/{%Barcode} merge tokens and produce merged output with one page per address.
as const tuple of 6 group-wizard steps (Identity, Organization, Meeting, Attributes, Settings, Review). Indexed by WizardStepIndex (0-5).
Throws on malformed GUID (accepts upper/lower hex). Used before interpolating User_GUID into MP filters.
Throws on non-integer, zero, or negative. Strictly positive (>= 1).
Throws if not matching /^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$/. Used before interpolating column names into selects.
